channel.title: Journal of Imagery Research in Sport and Physical Activity
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Imagery Research in Sport and Physical Activity

item.title: The role of coaches’ drawing in memorizing tactical soccer scene: a visuospatial abilities moderation analysis
item.description: Article by Jolly Roy, Cheryl Xavier, Aravind Athrey, Swedha Murali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2024-0031

item.title: The comparison of imagery training and mindfulness meditation training on competitive anxiety and heart rate variability in university athletes: a randomised controlled trial
item.description: Article by Jolly Roy, Cheryl Xavier, Aravind Athrey, Swedha Murali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2024-0017

item.title: Mind to muscle connection: temporal dynamics of concomitant kinesthetic responses during imagery training
item.description: Article by Jolly Roy, Cheryl Xavier, Aravind Athrey, Swedha Murali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jirspa-2024-0029
